scripts.dev: pnpm --filter shared build && concurrently --kill-others -n shared,ws,web -c blue,cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter shared dev" "pnpm --filter ws dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.build:ws: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter ws build
scripts.build:web: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter ws build && pnpm --filter web build
